name: lazy-eng-study-codex
description: Lazy English study for Codex with Korean translation and English correction.

interface.shortDescription: Study English while using Codex through translation and correction.
interface.longDescription: Lazy Eng Study Codex adds a UserPromptSubmit hook that detects Korean prompts, prepares Python through a portable bootstrap when needed, translates Korean to English, corrects explicit $gram English sentences, and returns the visible prompt line Codex should answer. Use $kortoeng-model or scripts/configure_model.ps1 after install to choose Spark, Mini, or GPT-5.5.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me configure lazy English study in Codex and choose Spark, Mini, or GPT-5.5.
